arts.ttl: Real Madrid preparing for WORLD RECORD Vini Jr transfer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are braced for Vinicius Junior to leave the club in the summer, with rumours of a €300 million switch to the Saudi Pro League gaining strength as the Spanish side grows fed up of the Brazilian’s antics. Vini Jr’s Real Madrid relationship continues to deteriorate

arts.ttl: Sterling misses Arsenal training as youngsters involved ahead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta put the Gunners squad through their paces for one final time on Monday ahead of Tuesday evening's huge clash. Excitement is building in north London and Arteta, like many others, can't wait for kick-off come 8pm on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Courtois: “In the Champions League there is more adrenaline, instead of going at 100% it’s 110%”
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois was put forward to speak to the media ahead of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium, and he spoke the difference with league games, he said, “I don’t think there is a big change. Now we have to change our mindset for the Champions League and play a good game against a good opponent.”

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Benjamin Sesko Keen to Join Arsenal This Summer
arts.sum: Arsenal have been handed a pre-summer boost as RB Leipzig frontman Benjamin Sesko is interested in heading to the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres agent 'to attend Champions League quarter-final' amid Arsenal, PSG transfer speculation
arts.sum: The agent of Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres is reportedly set to attend a blockbuster Champions League quarter-final this week amid increasing speculation.

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Man Utd initiate talks with KEY Arsenal target
arts.sum: Furthermore, Cunha’s agent is reportedly set to fly to England in order to initiate “face-to-face talks with potential suitors,” with Man Utd eager to finalise a deal amid the uncertain futures of Alejandro Garnacho and Marcus Rashford. Confirmation of Man Utd’s interest in Cunha follows his recent admission that he wants to leave Wolves this summer in order to challenge for major honours.

arts.ttl: Arsenal midfielder in confirmed talks over summer exit
arts.sum: Jorginho's Arsenal contract expires in the summer, two years after joining from London rivals Chelsea for a fee of around £12m.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale set for unwanted Arsenal reunion as transfer update given
arts.sum: Kicking off at 4pm on Sunday, May 25, the fixture is unlikely to affect the Premier League table with Liverpool boasting an 11 point gap to Arsenal in second - although it is highly likely Ramsdale will not have wanted to be facing his former club with relegation confirmed when he departed last year. Raya established himself as Arteta's number one, with Ramsdale keen on first team football and joined Southampton in a deal that included survival bonuses, which the Gunners will now miss out on.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could genuinely beat Real Madrid by exploiting one major Carlo Ancelotti weakness - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal can expose Real Madrid unlike no other team in the world 🤯

arts.ttl: Arteta: Tie against Real Madrid is my biggest night in management
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is preparing for the biggest night of his managerial career so far as his Arsenal side head into a mouthwatering UEFA Champions League quarter-final against the competition's most successful club, Real Madrid. Like his manager, Bukayo Saka also considers the Real Madrid match to be the biggest of his club career - "I think in an Arsenal shirt, it probably will be, yes" - and is excited by the trappings of Champions League success, including the chance to win the Ballon d'Or.
